args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

transfers_df = pd.DataFrame(json.loads(locals()['var_function-call-15811589942897143135']))
cases_handled_df = pd.DataFrame(json.loads(locals()['var_function-call-5232045593769771797']))

transfers_df['agent_id'] = transfers_df['agent_id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
cases_handled_df['agent_id'] = cases_handled_df['agent_id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()

transfers_df['transfer_count'] = pd.to_numeric(transfers_df['transfer_count'], errors='coerce').fillna(0).astype(int)
cases_handled_df['cases_handled'] = pd.to_numeric(cases_handled_df['cases_handled'], errors='coerce').fillna(0).astype(int)

merged_df = pd.merge(cases_handled_df, transfers_df, on='agent_id', how='left')
merged_df['transfer_count'] = merged_df['transfer_count'].fillna(0).astype(int)

filtered_df = merged_df[merged_df['cases_handled'] > 0]

min_transfer_agent = filtered_df.loc[filtered_df['transfer_count'].idxmin()]

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(min_transfer_agent['agent_id']))

import pandas as pd
import json

transfers_df = pd.DataFrame(locals()['var_function-call-15811589942897143135'])
cases_handled_df = pd.DataFrame(locals()['var_function-call-5232045593769771797'])

transfers_df['agent_id'] = transfers_df['agent_id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
cases_handled_df['agent_id'] = cases_handled_df['agent_id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()

transfers_df['transfer_count'] = pd.to_numeric(transfers_df['transfer_count'], errors='coerce').fillna(0).astype(int)
cases_handled_df['cases_handled'] = pd.to_numeric(cases_handled_df['cases_handled'], errors='coerce').fillna(0).astype(int)

merged_df = pd.merge(cases_handled_df, transfers_df, on='agent_id', how='left')
merged_df['transfer_count'] = merged_df['transfer_count'].fillna(0).astype(int)

filtered_df = merged_df[merged_df['cases_handled'] > 0]

min_transfer_agent = filtered_df.loc[filtered_df['transfer_count'].idxmin()]

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(min_transfer_agent['agent_id']))
